Meridian · Feature tour

Read a codebase like an execution graph

Meridian turns a repo into an Unreal-Blueprints-style map — the call graph, and each callable's intra-procedural logic flow. Eight steps, real frames from the running app.

Step 1 / 8

Node vocabulary

ƒ callBuilding block — a function/method call. Drill in if it has a body.
ifBranch — an if/switch; then/else/case leave as edges.
↻ loopLoop — for/while/.forEach; body nests inside.
DEFDefinition — a callable defined in the open module.
flow ⌄Ghost — a related flow that contains the selected node.

Gestures

⌘Pcommand palette — search any symbol
clickselect a block → its call-sites & related flows
dbldive into a block / loop / try-catch
</>source inline, then a highlighted modal
▸expand a call or loop's body in place
Generated from the live app · meridian web <owner/repo> Call flow · UI composition · Logic flow
